original_statement: what binary has the highest decimal value?
mutated_statement: what something has the highest overall measure?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Generalization/semantic vagueness: "binary" → "something" (specific noun → vague placeholder) | "decimal value" → "overall measure" (specific numeric measure → generalized/ambiguous measure) (what binary has the highest decimal value? → what something has the highest overall measure?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从提供的 judge_thought 可识别的关键信息：agent 给出明确结论“glyph 9 有最高整体度量”，并在解释中列举了各列最大值（binary 0011 1001, octal 071, decimal 57, hexadecimal 39）。日志中既无关于问题模糊性的提示，也没有要求澄清或表达不确定（没有使用 ambiguous/unclear/无法确定/需要更多信息 等词）。agent 直接把变异问题视为与原始问题等价并给出具体答案，表明它未识别到“something/overall measure”带来的歧义，因此应归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
